SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.seasonal.impl

Class ViewRiksdagenQ4ElectionYearComparison

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.seasonal.impl.ViewRiksdagenQ4ElectionYearComparison
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
@Entity public class ViewRiksdagenQ4ElectionYearComparison extends java.lang.Object implements java.io.Serializable
The Class ViewRiksdagenQ4ElectionYearComparison. Database view for Q4 (October-December) election year vs non-election year comparison.
